trades.reasoning: MSTR is up +17.3% from avg cost of $143.69, well past the +12% profit target — locking in gains and freeing a position slot.
Score-95 momentum leader with RSI 59.8 in the ideal bullish zone, MACD crossover confirmed, and price well above SMA-20 — strong setup in today's risk-on tape.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1.4% and S&P 500 up 1.2%, a favorable backdrop for growth and momentum names. MSTR has blown past its +12% profit target at +17.3% — selling the full position to lock in gains. Rotating into TSLA, the top score-95 momentum setup with RSI still in the healthy 55–70 bullish zone rather than overbought territory.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly today as investor risk appetite strengthened, with the NASDAQ leading gains at +1.4% — consistent with a rotation back into high-growth technology and momentum names. Crypto-linked equities like COIN and MSTR continued their strong runs as Bitcoin sentiment remained elevated, reflecting broader speculative confidence in risk assets. The S&P 500 gained 1.2%, suggesting the rally had broad participation beyond just mega-cap tech.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日全面上揚，投資者風險偏好明顯回升，那斯達克指數領漲1.4%，反映市場資金持續流入高成長科技及動能股。與加密貨幣相關的個股如COIN及MSTR延續強勢，顯示比特幣市場情緒依然樂觀，風險資產普遍受到追捧。標普500指數上升1.2%，漲勢具備廣泛基礎，並非僅由大型科技股帶動。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A profit target is a pre-set price level at which you sell a winning position to lock in gains. Rather than getting greedy and hoping for more upside, disciplined traders exit when a target is hit — protecting profits before a reversal can wipe them out. In this portfolio, MSTR hit +17% against a +12% target, making it a textbook take-profit situation.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 止盈目標是投資者預先設定的獲利賣出價位，當持倉漲幅達到目標時即行出場，鎖定利潤。有紀律的交易者不會因貪心而一味等待更高價位，因為漲勢隨時可能逆轉，導致已有盈利回吐。本組合中，MSTR漲幅達17%，早已超越12%的止盈目標，是教科書式的獲利了結時機。
